wiki.summary: “˂3 me” (previously dubbed as “VA Grim Reaper” by fans) is the thirteenth track to Nettspend’s debut studio album, early life crisis. The instrumental was produced by long time collaborator ok and Otwreg. On June 24, 2024, he would preview the track on his Instagram. The track would then quickly grow into a fan-favorite amongst the community. “˂3 me” by Nettspend was produced by ok & Otwreg. Nettspend released “˂3 me” on March 6, 2026. Read more on Last.fm.
